positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed stylized mandala featuring intertwining celestial elements, including crescent moons, stylized stars, and ethereal galactic swirls. The design utilizes intricate linework and bold, negative space contrast, rendered in deep indigo and luminous metallic gold against a stark white background. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. The style is graphic blackwork illustration meets Art Nouveau, creating a clean, bold silhouette with rich visual texture. Crisp vector quality, perfect for direct print application. Studio lighting, high contrast, flat illustration style.
negative: blur, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low contrast, messy, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradients, watercolor, sketch
